title: Breakwave Weekend Read
summary:
Main
As the week comes to a close, take a moment to review the key insights from the past few days. We've gathered all the top insights for you to catch up at your convenience. Stability Persists Albeit Nervousness Amongst Market Participants - Since early April, the dry bulk market has seen limited activity, with spot indices remaining within a broad range and freight futures gradually declining toward spot rates.
